def negative_function_local_import_executed_in_frequent_path():
    rule_id = "function_local_import_executed_in_frequent_path"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag hot call paths that perform imports inside the function body."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
